justification: All pass criteria met: (1) req.user?.id optional chaining risk identified with clear explanation of undefined !== undefined bypass, (2) authorization before data access principle stated — fix explicitly places userId check before DB query, (3) IDOR order enumeration via 404/403 differentiation clearly noted as first critical finding, (4) Critical severity assigned to both auth findings with BLOCK verdict, (5) safe_to_deploy is false.

observations.text: IDOR enumeration is the lead finding with concrete reproduction steps and correct fix (merge 403 into 404)
Auth bypass via undefined userId clearly explained with the null customerId edge case
Fix correctly places userId guard before any database access
Additional valid finding on input validation for orderId adds depth without diluting critical findings
Well-structured confidence section honestly notes assumptions about upstream middleware
